idea-plugin.name: Bridgely
idea-plugin.description:
Bidirectional bridge between JetBrains IDEs and Claude Code running in any terminal.
Gives Claude real-time awareness of your editor state and lets it open files, show diffs, and fetch LSP diagnostics — without leaving your external terminal.
idea-plugin.change-notes: 0.1.0 — Initial JetBrains release. Supports editor state sync, file open, reveal line, get selection, diagnostics, git diff, and edit preview.
